oracle_text_snapshot.Kiki-Jiki, Mirror Breaker: Haste {T}: Create a token that's a copy of target nonlegendary creature you control, except it has haste. Sacrifice it at the beginning of the next end step.
oracle_text_snapshot.Zealous Conscripts: Haste When this creature enters, gain control of target permanent until end of turn. Untap that permanent. It gains haste until end of turn.

expected_minimal_action_sequence.action: creates a hasty token copy of the ETB untapper
token copy enters and untaps the repeatable copier
the hasty copy engine is restored and can repeat
